titleStmt.title: SII 31.239: original edition by C. A. Padmanabha Sastri and T. S. Ravishankar
No. 239. (A.R. No. B 250 of 1938.) MĪRĀPURAM, KAMALAPURAM TALUK, CUDDAPAH DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a beam in the mukha-maṇḍapa of the Rāmaliṅgēśvara svāmi temple.
It is dated in Śaka 1666, Akshya (wrong for Raktāksha) Jyēshṭha, ba. 7, corresponding to May 22, Monday, 1744 A.D.

Slightly damaged. Registers the gift of land measuring 2 yidumus situated on the eastern side of the village Mīrāpuram by Rajāśri LālānadhaAmalu, (Lāla Amantul) the amina of Sammuturu in view of the loans taken by Yarramaredi, son of Dūsireḍi Timmareḍi for the construction of Īśvara temple.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . vijayābhyudaya śālivāhana śakava¨rṣaṁbulu 1666 Agunēṭi Akṣayanāma saṁvatsara jyēṣṭa ba 7 lu rājāśrīlālānadhamalu Amī
lu saṁmuṭūru vagairāgāru mīrāpuraṁ dugireḍi tiṁmāreḍḍi kumāruḍu yarramareḍiki vrāyiṁci yiccina bhūdānapatraṁ nīvu Amīrāpuraṁ grā
mamaṁdu Īśvaruni dēvaḷaṁ kaṭṭiṁci śivapratiṣṭha cēśi vigrahālu koṭṭiṁci saṁprōkṣaṇa cēyiṁcci vanaṁ vēyiṁccivuṁḍēyī tha¨rmamu nimittamu ruṇamu cēsuku
ṁnānu yiṁdulaku ganū mīrāpuraṁna polamulō Āgrāmāsa vaṁka cēnu 02 yidumu vūri tū¨rpuna
vubhayaṁ cēnu tūmeṁdunu tigāyicināmu
putrapautrapāraṁparyaṁ Ācaṁdrā¨rkasdāyigā Anubhaviṁcēdi cesuka sukhāna vuṁḍēdi . svadattā dviguṇaṁ puṇyaṁ paradattānu pālanaṁ paradattāpaharēṇa svada
ttaṁ niṣpalaṁ bhavēt . yīdha¨rmmanaku
yagāru vrālu
Digital edition of SII 31.239 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
